description: A plain candid color photograph with no on-image text or graphic design overlays. It depicts large pallets of seized contraband on the deck of a Coast Guard / law-enforcement cutter: numerous bales of suspected narcotics are tightly bundled in burlap and shrink-wrapped in clear plastic, banded with straps and marked with bright green tape tags, stacked into big blocks on the ship's deck. In the background rises the gray superstructure and mast of the cutter (radar dome, sensor masts, a striped hazard-marked hull opening), under a blue sky with scattered clouds. A few crew members stand at the left edge near the ship's interior. This is documentary operational imagery of a drug interdiction (matching the tweet about ICE's Panama Express Strike Force seizing ~$150M in cocaine and marijuana).
